title: anneslia minutifolia
intro: Anneslia minutifolia, also known as Anneslia or Small-leaved Anneslia, is a flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Anneslia minutifolia include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and treating various infections, such as respiratory and urinary tract infections. Anneslia minutifolia can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, and is also used in traditional folk remedies in some parts of the world.
